---
title: "Summary of data rescues"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
date: last-modified
date-format: YYYY-MMMM
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)

```

# Counts: Studies, tables, and figures

```{r}

directories.ls <- tibble(filenames = list.files(path = '.',
                      recursive = FALSE)) |>
  filter(!str_detect(filenames, '^\\w+\\.\\w+$'))

readME.ls <- tibble(filenames = list.files(path = '.',
                      recursive = TRUE)) |>
  filter(str_detect(filenames, '^\\w+/\\w+\\.\\wmd$')) 
  filter(str_detect(filenames, '^\\w+/README\\w+\\.\\w+$')) #only look at 
```

# Template adherence

## YAML

## Sections

# People and time

# Level 1
